Reason: Download page not found

3. This resource type can't be downloaded.

Tip: Go to Settings ⇒ Privacy ⇒ Access Token.

privacy.access_token_label: Access Token (for resources that require login):
privacy.token_help:
The National Smart Education Platform sometimes requires login to download textbooks. This app only stores your Access Token locally.

How to get it:
1. Open the platform (https://auth.smartedu.cn/uias/login) and log in.
2. Press F12 or Ctrl+Shift+I, open Developer Tools, and switch to Console.
3. Paste the code below, press Enter, then copy the token after "Access Token:".
privacy.copy_code_success:
JS code copied!

Paste it into the browser console and run it.

docs.readme_html_content:
Smart-edu-downloader User Guide

Introduction

Smart-edu-downloader (SED) is a textbook download tool designed for primary and secondary school students, supporting fast download of various electronic textbooks and teaching resources.

Main Features

1. Textbook Download Tutorial

  • Step 1: Open the education cloud platform or resource library
  • Step 2: Select the textbook or resource you want to download on the platform, or choose from the resource library
  • Step 3: Copy the download link and paste it on the Home page, then click the download button (for cloud platform)
  • Or directly click the download button (for resource library)
  • Step 4: Wait for the download to complete

2. Resource Library

  • Browse textbook resources by subject, grade, and version
  • Advanced search with keyword support
  • View resource details
  • One-click download resources

3. Download Management

  • Real-time download progress and speed display
  • Total progress bar and total file size display
  • Supports pause, resume, and cancel downloads
  • Double-click to open file, right-click context menu
  • Drag files out of the download list
  • Download history persists across program restarts

4. System Settings

  • Download path settings
  • Max concurrent downloads setting
  • Download threads setting
  • Download mode setting
  • UI scaling setting

5. Experimental Features

  • Press F12 to open debug panel
  • Theme color customization (beta)

6. Other Features

  • Top-right notification on download completion
  • Import/Export configuration
  • Restore default settings

FAQ

Q: Download speed is slow, what should I do?

A: You can adjust the max concurrent downloads and thread count in Settings; increasing them appropriately may improve speed.

Q: Download failed, what should I do?

A: Check your network connection, try using the legacy semi-automatic mode, or click the 'Retry' button in the download list.

Q: How to find the downloaded files?

A: Double-click the file in the download list or right-click and select 'Open Folder Location'.

Contact Author

Author: Edgerd

Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/3537111380658360
